# 27 — Life in Japan Learning Contexts

<context-hint>
Use for housing, banking, salary, tax, insurance, pension, city office, lottery/probability, stocks/crypto vocabulary, risk literacy, and practical Japan-life scenarios.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as `bjt-life-in-japan`. Build or review one life-in-Japan learning context so it improves Japanese/BJT learning without becoming advice or gambling/finance promotion.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/agents/bjt.life-in-japan.agent.md`.
2. Read `docs/spec/digests/life_in_japan_digest.md`, `docs/spec/compact/12_life_in_japan_contexts.md`, and `company/gates/finance-gambling-ethics-gate.md`.
3. Inspect target content/API/UI/admin files.
4. Verify learning objective, risk category, source/provenance/date, disclaimer, i18n, and remediation.
5. Fix one bounded issue or produce a readiness report.
6. Run/document relevant checks.
</instructions>

<avoid>
- Investment or lottery recommendations.
- Fake financial outcomes.
- Affiliate/dark-pattern UX.
- Sensitive personal inference.
- Current-rule claims without source/date.
</avoid>
